resources.string: Tap again if you are sure you want to delete hidden files
Tap again if you know, that you will not be able to decrypt encrypted file with this app
Tap again if you are sure you want delete settings
Tap again to confirm app data delete
This will clear all your hidden files, setting, cache, and other app data. Also you will be not able to decrypt encrypted files, which are encrypted with this app.
Error occurred when app data was deleting
Biometric authentication is significantly less secure than a password. To improve the security of your files is recommended using only a password to restrict app access. But you can use both.
Password or biometric authentication is not set
Biometric authenticator is not specified or available
Biometric authenticator is not specified, click to open settings
App is unlocked. Tap to lock app.
Service to handle unlocking of the app
This is a beta version of the app. This means you should not use this app with important files. The developers of this app are not responsible for your data lose or corruption!

Here you can change storage.
(E.g.: change to hidden storage)
Only one creation of zip is allowed at once
Receiver for ZipManagerService to handle notification actions
Service to handle zip files creation or extraction of zip
Please choose the top folder of the SD card on the next screen, to grant write access
"If you don't see the SD card, try this"
Some files could not be copied
"Can't extract file, because file %s is in conflict"
Some files could not be decrypted
Are you sure you want to delete %s?
Open source file manager for keeping your files in safe
Block screenshots in the recent list and inside the app is disabled
Block screenshots in the recent list and inside the app is enabled
After long press on a file, you can encrypt it with this icon.
Some files could not be encrypted
You can add frequently used folders to favorites for easy access from anywhere.

Create a photo or video to a specified destination.
(E.g.: directly take a media file to hidden storage)
"The press on file will open it. Long press on it will trigger manipulation mode."
This device does not have a fingerprint sensor
Too many attempts. Please try again later.
No PIN, pattern, or password set.
This device does not support PIN, pattern, or password.
After long press on a file, you can hide it with this icon.
Some files could not be hidden
Files are encrypted without password with key saved securely in your device (in the AndroidKeyStore).
The encryption make possible, that an encrypted files could not be read by an unauthorized person.
This icon means, that selected files will be encrypted.
This icon means, that selected files will be decrypted.
WARNING: If you uninstall this app, you will not be able to decrypt your encrypted secrets never again!
Files in the hidden storage are accessible only to this app.
This icon means, that selected files will be moved to the hidden storage.
This icon means, that selected files will be moved from the hidden storage to a selected destination.
WARNING: If you uninstall this app or clear app storage, you will also remove all your hidden secrets!
Enabling lock app access is highly recommended to keep your secrets safe.
Create or extract zip files or encrypted zip files.
Please allow the storage permission to continue
This app requires storage permission. Without this permission, the app will be useless.
"If you clicked deny & don't ask again, you can only allow the storage permission from the app system settings."
Could not write to the selected destination
Password must contain 8 characters and at least one number and one letter
Keep source file after encryption/decryption is disabled
Keep source file after encryption/decryption is enabled
Keep old last-modified value at file operations is disabled
Keep old last-modified value at file operations is enabled

" AboutLibraries is a library to offer you all the information you need of your libraries!

Most modern apps feature a Used Library-section, which requires information about those respective libs. As it gets annoying to always copy those strings to your app, I have developed this small helper library to provide the required information. "
Provides the base Activity subclass and the relevant hooks to build a composable structure on top.

"Java annotation for use on unstable Android API surfaces. When used in conjunction with the Experimental annotation lint checks, this annotation provides functional parity with Kotlin's Experimental annotation."

"The Support Library is a static library that you can add to your Android application in order to use APIs that are either not available for older platform versions or utility APIs that aren't a part of the framework APIs."

"The Support Library is a static library that you can add to your Android application in order to use APIs that are either not available for older platform versions or utility APIs that aren't a part of the framework APIs. Compatible on devices running API 14 or later."

The Resources Library is a static library that you can add to your Android application in order to use resource APIs that backport the latest APIs to older versions of the platform. Compatible on devices running API 14 or later.

The Biometric library is a static library that you can add to your Android application. It invokes BiometricPrompt on devices running P and greater, and on older devices will show a compat dialog. Compatible on devices running API 14 or later.

"The Support Library is a static library that you can add to your Android application in order to use APIs that are either not available for older platform versions or utility APIs that aren't a part of the framework APIs. Compatible on devices running API 14 or later."

"The Support Library is a static library that you can add to your Android application in order to use APIs that are either not available for older platform versions or utility APIs that aren't a part of the framework APIs. Compatible on devices running API 14 or later."

"The Support Library is a static library that you can add to your Android application in order to use APIs that are either not available for older platform versions or utility APIs that aren't a part of the framework APIs. Compatible on devices running API 14 or later."

"The Support Library is a static library that you can add to your Android application in order to use APIs that are either not available for older platform versions or utility APIs that aren't a part of the framework APIs. Compatible on devices running API 14 or later."

"The Support Library is a static library that you can add to your Android application in order to use APIs that are either not available for older platform versions or utility APIs that aren't a part of the framework APIs. Compatible on devices running API 14 or later."

"The Support Library is a static library that you can add to your Android application in order to use APIs that are either not available for older platform versions or utility APIs that aren't a part of the framework APIs. Compatible on devices running API 14 or later."
Physics-based animation in support library, where the animations are driven by physics force. You can use this Animation library to create smooth and realistic animations.

"The Support Library is a static library that you can add to your Android application in order to use APIs that are either not available for older platform versions or utility APIs that aren't a part of the framework APIs. Compatible on devices running API 14 or later."

"The Support Library is a static library that you can add to your Android application in order to use APIs that are either not available for older platform versions or utility APIs that aren't a part of the framework APIs. Compatible on devices running API 14 or later."

"The Support Library is a static library that you can add to your Android application in order to use APIs that are either not available for older platform versions or utility APIs that aren't a part of the framework APIs. Compatible on devices running API 14 or later."

"The Support Library is a static library that you can add to your Android application in order to use APIs that are either not available for older platform versions or utility APIs that aren't a part of the framework APIs. Compatible on devices running API 14 or later."

"The Support Library is a static library that you can add to your Android application in order to use APIs that are either not available for older platform versions or utility APIs that aren't a part of the framework APIs. Compatible on devices running API 14 or later."

"The Support Library is a static library that you can add to your Android application in order to use APIs that are either not available for older platform versions or utility APIs that aren't a part of the framework APIs. Compatible on devices running API 14 or later."
Provides the base Activity subclass and the relevant hooks to build a composable structure on top.

"The Support Library is a static library that you can add to your Android application in order to use APIs that are either not available for older platform versions or utility APIs that aren't a part of the framework APIs. Compatible on devices running API 14 or later."
Provides a stable but relatively compact binary serialization format that can be passed across processes or persisted safely.

"The Support Library is a static library that you can add to your Android application in order to use APIs that are either not available for older platform versions or utility APIs that aren't a part of the framework APIs. Compatible on devices running API 14 or later."
An implementation of tap targets from the Material Design guidelines for feature discovery
Make a cool intro for your Android app.
A set of annotations for configuring Glide.
"A cache that uses a bounded amount of space on a filesystem. Based on Jake Wharton's tailored for Glide."
Implementation of GifDecoder that is more memory efficient to animate for Android devices.
A fast and efficient image loading library for Android focused on smooth scrolling.
Zip4j - A Java library for zip files and streams

Material Components for Android is a static library that you can add to your Android application in order to use APIs that provide implementations of the Material Design specification. Compatible on devices running API 14 or later.
Tink is a small cryptographic library that provides a safe, simple, agile and fast way to accomplish some common cryptographic tasks.
A description of what my library does.
AboutLibraries is a library to offer some information of libraries.
The bullet proof, fast and easy to use adapter library, which minimizes developing time to a fraction...
FastAdapter, the bullet proof, fast and easy to use adapter library, which minimizes developing time to a fraction...
A set of annotations used for code inspection support and code documentation.

Receiver to lock the app at boot and shutdown
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
You cannot share this much content at once

After long press on a file, you can find more file operations here.
(E.g.: create zip, create encrypted zip, move, copy, rename, etc…)
Some files could not be moved
Tap to switch to selecting a day
Tap to switch to selecting a year
A file or folder with that name already exists
"The destination does not have enough space available. Required %1$s, available %2$s"
Are you sure you want to proceed with the deletion?
SD card and USB device paths cannot be the same
Are you sure you want to share %s from hidden storage?
Source and destination cannot be the same

Here you can confirm destination for file in the hidden storage.
Tip: You can create folders in the hidden storage for better organization of the hidden files
Type in at least 2 characters to start the search.
Some files could not be unhidden
Use also biometric authentication is disabled
Use also biometric authentication is enabled
Biometric authenticator is not specified or available
Wrong folder selected, please select the root folder of your SD card
